key.name: number-position
key.summary: Position of OSD number if a level is shown (left, right, hidden)

key.name: icon-position
key.summary: Position of OSD icon if a level is shown (left, right, hidden)

key.name: adapt-panel-menu
key.summary: Adapt the audio I/O volume sliders in the panel menu

key.name: adapt-panel-menu-brightness
key.summary: Adapt the brightness slider in the panel menu

key.name: show-brightness-percentage
key.summary: Show brightness percentage indicator in the panel

key.name: show-sound-percentage
key.summary: Show sound volume percentage in the panel quick settings
